Documentation","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":""}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-16T13:16:41Z","updated_at":"2024-09-16T13:16:41Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Issue with current documentation:

In the API reference for versions 2.0.0+, the parameter `mean` of the `numpy.var()` function is labeled to be new in 1.26.0. However, in the documentation for 1.26.0 this parameter is not mentioned, and it was not implemented in 1.26.4 (as far as I've seen). 

[https://numpy.org/doc/stable/reference/generated/numpy.var.html](url) 

### Idea or request for content:

Change the version which it was added from 1.26.0 to 2.0.0.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27399/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27399/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}
